title: Contact Foster LLP | Houston & Austin, TX | Immigration Law Firm
content:
## Global Immigration Lawyers Dedicated to Helping You

### Contact Our Immigration Law Firm Today
Foster LLP is dedicated to providing quality immigration legal services to individuals, families, and employers in the Texas area and around the globe. Our friendly and knowledgeable immigration lawyers in Austin , and Houston , TX are standing by to serve you, including in the H-1B visa process, green card process, global immigration, and obtaining U.S. citizenship
Whether you are interested in applying for a temporary work visa, have questions regarding employee sponsorship for permanent residency, need to prepare for your upcoming green card interview, or have any other immigration needs or concerns, follow the link below to request a consultation with one of our many qualified immigration lawyers to get started today. We sincerely appreciate you selecting our firm for your immigration needs.
We offer consultations by phone and video technology, including Microsoft Teams, Webex and Zoom
3 Greenway Plaza Suite 800 Houston, Texas 77046, USA Phone: 713-229-8733 Fax: 713-228-1303 info@fosterglobal.com
